y_axis.notes: Source figure has NO y-axis title. The data.csv column 'survival_proportion' is an inferred semantic interpretation, not extracted from the chart.

series_legend.marker_shape: diamond with black outline and light-gray fill
series_legend.marker_shape_notes: Recipe §2b describes this as 'open black diamond' but the actual rendering is a thin black outline around a gray (~205-230) fill. Surfaced during TDD step 4.

notes: Grayscale-shape scatter (no color cue between series). Legend at right margin (rows 280-400, cols 870-980). data.csv contains 3 phantom rows (24C @ x=56.88, 30C @ x=57.68, 30C @ x=58.27) that captured the legend swatches at cols 940-962 instead of real data — these should be filtered out in Phase 5. The audit-flagged 'missing 30°C tail diamond at (40, 0)' is NOT missing from data.csv (the matched-frame overlay shows it cleanly); the previous matplotlib replot lost it.
